expectations.evidence: width: 33% combined with margin: 10px breaks the math. Three cards at 33% = 99%, but adding 20px of horizontal margin per card pushes the total well over 100%
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: var(--space-md);
Automatically fits as many 280px+ columns as possible, No media queries needed for basic responsiveness, Desktop (>1280px), Tablet (768-1279px), Mobile (<768px)
Without explicit row height settings, cards stretch to fill their row but rows can be different heights, grid-auto-rows: 1fr: Forces all rows to be equal height
